caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall featuring framed photographs and a clothing rack with apparel, including a garment with "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners; a logo on the left reads "THE STALBIO PODCAST" and text on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY." As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated and looks slightly to his left, speaking with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movements. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up in a consistent medium shot throughout the clip.
